description_long: This object is a compact dumbbell with a cylindrical metal handle and two round, dark-colored weight plates on either end. The handle appears to be made of steel, featuring a slightly textured or knurled grip for secure handling. The weight plates have a rugged, slightly worn surface, suggesting frequent use and exposure to the elements, possibly with some rust or patina. The ends of the dumbbell are flat and circular, with no visible brand logos or weight markings. The overall construction is robust, with the plates securely fixed to the handle. The color palette is dominated by metallic gray and dark brownish-black tones, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance.
description: A sturdy dumbbell with a metal handle and two round, dark, slightly worn weight plates. The surface shows signs of use and weathering, with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dumbbell, with both round weight plates and the textured handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view displaying one circular weight plate and the cylindrical handle extending outward, emphasizing the plate's thickness and surface texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the dumbbell's length and both weight plates from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, highlighting the other weight plate and the handle's cylindrical profile.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, round cross-section, metal, knurled texture for grip, no ergonomic padding.
attribute_end_cap_design: Flat, round, metal end caps with a rugged, slightly worn surface; no visible patterns or embellishments.
attribute_condition: Shows visible signs of wear and weathering, with some surface rust and scratches; not new.
